message:
fix: move as_any methods from enum to Brain impl in brain-ml

Corrects Brain trait implementation in MlBrain by moving as_any/as_any_mut
methods from MlBackendKind enum (where they were misplaced) to the Brain
trait impl block. Also fixes import ordering for consistency.

Changes:
• Moved as_any() and as_any_mut() from MlBackendKind enum to MlBrain's Brain impl
• Reordered imports: into_runner, Brain, BrainKind → Brain, BrainKind, into_runner
• Enables proper downcast support for ML brain crossover compatibility

This was a cleanup from the Brain trait enhancement that added Any bounds.
The methods were accidentally placed in the wrong scope during development.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
